title: Resource Graphs, Cache Evidence, Budgets, and Performance Non-Claims · Language Lens: Resource Reference Graph
summary: The tool reports document bytes as total page weight, ignores encoded versus decoded sizes and browser discovery, and turns one server timing into user performance. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go resource reference graph increment in static resource and delivery evidence dossier. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Inventory document, style, script, image, font, media, module, preload, and third-party references with source and scope.
Link findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, affected users, page state, severity rationale, evidence, uncertainty, and human owner without conformance claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
